summary: Iteration 3 testing: 18/19 backend pytest cases PASS. One critical backend bug: GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} consistently returns 502 (Stripe: 'No such checkout.session') — checkout creation goes via emergent integrations proxy but status retrieval calls real Stripe. Frontend had a CRITICAL blocker: app/results.tsx imports react-native-svg which was NOT in package.json, causing Metro to throw 'Server Error: Unable to resolve module react-native-svg' and bricking the ENTIRE web preview. Installed react-native-svg@15.15.4 via yarn and restarted expo — home now loads correctly. Validated: home loaded with install-btn, avatar-sofia tap routes to /chat, real Claude intro bubble appears (~7s), chat-start-interview testID is visible. Could not exhaustively walk every screen (chat -> interview -> 5 answers -> results -> checkout) end-to-end due to time + LLM latency budget, but all critical iter3 testIDs are wired and the underlying APIs all return correct shapes per pytest.

critical.issue: Always returns 502 'Stripe error: No such checkout.session: cs_test_...'. Reproduced twice with fresh sessions. POST /api/payments/checkout succeeds (calls integrations.emergentagent.com proxy and returns a valid cs_test_ id + checkout.stripe.com URL) but get_checkout_status() in emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout appears to query real Stripe directly, where the proxy-issued session does not exist. Affects purchase confirmation / post-payment polling.

ui_bugs.issue: Imports react-native-svg (used for radar chart) but the package was missing from /app/frontend/package.json — Metro served a Server Error for ALL routes, not just /results. FIXED in this run by running 'yarn add react-native-svg' (15.15.4).

integration_issues.issue: Even though pay-btn POSTs successfully and returns a checkout.stripe.com URL + session_id, the subsequent /api/payments/status call cannot succeed (see backend critical). Frontend success-screen / purchase confirmation logic that depends on this endpoint will not work end-to-end.

issues: Pre-existing 'shadow*' deprecation warnings on web (cosmetic, non-blocking, carried over from iter2).

action_items: FIX (backend, HIGH): /api/payments/status/{session_id} — investigate emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout.get_checkout_status. Either it must call the same emergent proxy endpoint that created the session, or POST /payments/checkout must use the real Stripe API key directly. Without this, paid-status polling and the purchase confirmation flow are broken.

VERIFY (frontend): react-native-svg has been added to package.json by the testing agent (15.15.4). Confirm this stays committed and that it matches Expo SDK compatibility (Expo may suggest a specific version).

VERIFY (frontend): Walk the full /chat (Sofia) -> /interview -> 5 answers -> /results radar chart -> Done -> Home flow now that the bundler error is unblocked. Same for /jobs from Maya and /checkout pay-btn redirect.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is healthy: prefix /api on every route, _id excluded from finds, datetimes timezone-aware, models use uuid ids. Good async usage.
services/llm.py: openai_json safely strips ``` fences and falls back on json error — robust. Good.
services/voice.py: clean stub returning 501 until ELEVENLABS_API_KEY is set — exactly as spec.
Frontend: missing dependency react-native-svg should have been caught earlier; consider a CI step that runs `expo doctor` or `tsc --noEmit` to surface unresolved imports before runtime.

success_rate.frontend: blocker fixed; partial flow validated (home + sofia chat intro + chat-start-interview testID visible); full radar/results path NOT walked end-to-end

seed_data_creation: pytest test_iteration3.py created 1 chat session, 1 profile, 1 interview (3-question), 2 stripe checkout sessions (test mode), 1 saved-job (then deleted) under user_id 'TEST_iter3_user'. Cleanup of test purchases not performed (test-mode Stripe sessions are harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two outstanding items after main agent fixes: (1) Re-run pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py — only test_payments_status should currently fail. (2) Re-run a Playwright walkthrough of: home -> avatar-sofia -> /chat (intro bubble in ~7s) -> chat-start-interview -> /interview answer 5 times (each LLM call ~5s, so allow 8s wait per submit) -> /results showing radar (testID results-* and results-restart) -> Home. Also home -> avatar-maya -> chat-find-jobs -> /jobs -> job-save-{id}/job-apply-{id}. Stripe pay-btn fires checkout fine; cannot full-redirect test in headless. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://career-app-enhance.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_issue: Bug 1 (payments/status 502): emergentintegrations Stripe checkout creates sessions through https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe/v1/checkout/sessions (proxy), but get_checkout_status() retrieves via the standard Stripe SDK, which doesn't recognise proxy-issued cs_test_ ids. Either the SDK needs to call the proxy's GET /v1/checkout/sessions/{id} endpoint, or session creation should use real Stripe directly. Bug 2 (react-native-svg missing): app/results.tsx imports the package but it was never added to package.json — Metro fails-fast on resolve, throwing a single Server Error that blocks the entire app, not just /results. Fixed by `yarn add react-native-svg` (15.15.4). Reproduction: visit any URL on https://career-app-enhance.preview.emergentagent.com — pre-fix every page rendered 'Server Error: Unable to resolve module react-native-svg from /app/frontend/app/results.tsx'.
